pageContext.name: Malzeno Creator’s Model
pageContext.description: Malzeno, an Elder Dragon first introduced in Monster Hunter Rise: Sunbreak, makes its way to the Capcom Figure Builder - Creator's Kit line!  Malzeno stands poised, gazing down upon its prey amid a rocky landscape, its unique physiology on full display- remember to look out for that tail, it can be used to grab unsuspecting hunters.  This PVC figure, officially manufactured and released by Capcom, stands almost 9 and a half inches tall, making it an imposing display that can fit almost anywhere- a perfect mix of form and function.  Add this bizarre wyvern to your Monser Hunter collection today!
